name: Untouchable
overview: The city of Bukcheon has been dominated by the Jang family for 3 generations. Jang Joon-Seo is the second son of family leader Jang Beom-Ho. A woman who Jang Joon-Seo loves dies. After that, he tries to reveal the truth about her death and a secret from his family.

trailers.title: Upcoming 2017 Korean Drama II Untouchable 언터처블 II
